rationale: Israel's strikes on Lebanon and the ongoing Iran-US deal talks are the most relevant new signals for Romania — energy price uncertainty persists, and Black Sea security remains unchanged; no qualitative shift in the Ukraine war.

top_events.title: Israel strikes Lebanon; Iran-US deal claimed near
top_events.summary: Ongoing Israeli military action in Lebanon and Iran's near-deal claim sustain energy price uncertainty relevant to Romania's import-dependent economy. No resolution yet.

top_events.title: 117 million people displaced worldwide, Lebanon war victims included
top_events.summary: Record global displacement figures, including from Lebanon, could increase migration pressure toward EU countries including Romania on the eastern flank.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on migration cap reflects broader European tensions on population and migration policy, with indirect relevance to EU-wide migration debates touching Romania.
